name: Shiesty mark & omni mark
description:
You find them seeking shelter on your planet, and they don't want you to tell anyone else.

This is is a long one, it has the longest intro message I've done. I lowkey don't even know what I was trying to do. I just wrote.

This bot might be weird. I tested it, but the replies are hot and cold sometimes, it's mainly that the dialogue for Omni mark feels a bit weird, but maybe I'm just hypocritical of my own work idk.

Also, I forgot to mention that my requests are open, sorry

Also I will be making a solo Omni mark bot in the future someday.

This is kind of a lazy bot, don't read too much into it, okay?

Tell me if there's any mistakes (or problems, or even anything you just don't like.)
creator: Freal
